stemHtml:
On which of the following circumstances is flight above a congested area allowed?

1. When 1000 ft clearance within 8 km of highest terrain applies
2. In order to land at a certified landing area
3. With authorization from competent authority
4. During take-off
5. At a altitude that would allow a safe landing without undue hazard to persons or property on the surface
6. With 8 km visibility and 1000 ft distance from the clouds
7. Immediately after take-off
